description_long: This church features a tall, slender spire topped with a cross, rising from a square bell tower that anchors one end of the building. The main structure has a steeply pitched, dark roof with several smaller gabled sections and decorative finials at the roof peaks. The facade is adorned with arched windows and a circular window above the main entrance, which is flanked by buttresses and small decorative elements. The exterior walls are rendered in a muted greenish-gray, contrasting with the darker roof. Wooden beams or supports are visible along the sides, adding structural detail. The overall design is reminiscent of Gothic Revival architecture, with pointed arches, vertical emphasis, and ornate roofline features.
description: A Gothic Revival-style church with a tall spire, dark pitched roof, arched windows, and decorative buttresses. The exterior is greenish-gray with prominent architectural details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall spire, square bell tower, and the length of the main roof with visible buttresses.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the intersecting gabled roofs and the pointed arch of the rear window.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the nave, buttresses, and the spire rising from the bell tower.
description_view_3: Frontal view featuring the main entrance, circular window, and the prominent spire above the bell tower.
